label: Pbla
note: The constitutive P3 promoter of the pBR322 bla (TEM-1 beta-lactamase / AmpR) gene: the sigma-70 -35/-10 pair. Trimmed to the promoter — the native 5'UTR and ribosome binding site are a distinct fun...
Sigma-70 -35 hexamer TTCAAA of the pBR322 bla P3 promoter (4/6 to consensus TTGACA), 17 bp upstream of the -10.
Sigma-70 -10 hexamer GACAAT (4/6 to TATAAT), 17 bp downstream of the -35 (optimal spacing).
